scripts.test: tsc && wrangler deploy --dry-run && npx vitest run --config tests/vitest.config.mts
scripts.db:pull: npx wrangler d1 export iotkit-users --remote --output .wrangler/d1-remote-dump.sql && rm -rf .wrangler/state/v3/d1 && npx wrangler d1 execute DB --local --file .wrangler/d1-remote-dump.sql && rm .wrangler/d1-remote-dump.sql
